title: Adding github action to generate a badge for first time contributor
body:
This github action uses the certficate_generator.html from automation repo to generate the badge for first time contributors and commits the badge to the same repo which will be commented on the PR once its get merged.


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
